summary: ESNI Management | Policies | Verify Tab  & Table Display
description: Verify Policies screen loads and displays policy data correctly
gherkin:
When the user navigates to the "Policies" tab in the ESNI Management section
Then a button labeled "Add Viewing Policy" should be visible at the top-left of the screen
And a "Search" input field should be visible at the top-right of the screen
And a "View"  button should be visible next to the search input
And a data table should be displayed with the following columns:
* Policy Name
* Href
* Action
And each row should display a valid policy with:
* A unique Policy Name
* A corresponding Href value
* An Action value such as ALLOW or REJECT or IGNORE
And each row should have a "View Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right
And pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the screen
And the default rows per page should be set to "25"

steps.action: *When* the user navigates to the "Policies" tab in the ESNI Management section
steps.result:
*Then* a button labeled "Add Viewing Policy" should be visible at the top-left of the screen

*And* a "Search" input field should be visible at the top-right of the screen

*And* a "View"  button should be visible next to the search input

*And* a data table should be displayed with the following columns:

* Policy Name
* Href
* Action

*And* each row should display a valid policy with:

* A unique Policy Name
* A corresponding Href value
* An Action value such as ALLOW or REJECT or IGNORE

*And* each row should have a "View Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right

*And* pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the screen

*And* the default rows per page should be set to "25"
